creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
This PR is being created to track the work described here:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-toolchain/2012-September/000571.html

In particular I need assistance in doing an exp- run with the patch attached to that mailing list post as there are a handful of ports that use bsd.prog.mk:

archivers/zipmix
archivers/parchive
security/sst
games/grubinvaders
games/cre
benchmarks/tcpblast
benchmarks/raidtest
converters/chmview
chinese/docproj
devel/ruby-byaccr
devel/vb2c
devel/tclcheck
japanese/edyvalue
japanese/suicavalue
net/minidlna
cad/gdt
net-mgmt/icmpquery
palm/mdbconv
print/epsonepl
russian/koi2koi
shells/nologinmsg
shells/v7sh
sysutils/sb16config
sysutils/sbniconfig
textproc/fixrtf
textproc/hhm
x11/gpctool

bapt@ offered to assist with the exp- run.
